CustomField.label: Client Secret
CustomField.description: Beefree SDK Client Secret from SDK Console. WARNING: This value is stored as plain text in Custom Metadata and is NOT encrypted at rest. For secure authentication in production, DO NOT use this field. Instead, store the client secret in a secure backend environment variable and/or configure Salesforce Named Credentials / External Credentials to handle authentication. This field is provided only for demo/non-production setups where this limitation is acceptable.
